publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-01-09 18:34:06 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration. Nestlé Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Menus collected by the Nestle Library and used in research projects by students.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Nestle Library Menu Collection, #6674 . Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
